primary_beneficiary: Chris B. Noe, Jr., of Chicago, Illinois
alternate_beneficiary: Avery V. Poe of Philadelphia, Pennsylvania and Alex H. Public of New York, New York, in equal shares
legal_description: A certain lot or parcel of land with the buildings thereon at 200 Drew T. Loe, Jordan N. Noe, in the Town of York, County of York and State of Maine, being the premises conveyed to the Owner by deed recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 1724, Page 9.
